title: Western Roman Empire
symbolicOrderDefinition: Draft operational shorthand for the durable shared meanings, legitimacy claims, memory, obligation, and sacrifice logic associated with Western Roman Empire.
symbolicOrderStrengthRationale: Provisional scaffold score based on the case outcome category; requires evidence-chain review before scholarly use.
selectionRationale: Included to test loss of legitimacy, coherence, authority, or command capacity.
theoryTest: Tests whether embodied symbolic orders can lose legitimacy or command capacity instead of escalating sacrifice.
